arts.ttl: Liverpool star offers himself to club – Transfer self-marketing ahead of summer window opening
arts.sum: Liverpool star Luis Diaz has offered himself to Barcelona and told the club he is open to a move in the summer transfer window. That’s according to El Chiringuito and journalist Jose Alvarez, who reports that Diaz’s agents have been speaking to Barcelona and director of football Deco. arts.ttl: Aston Villa transfer news: Former Chelsea target viewed as ideal Jhon Duran replacement?
arts.sum: Aston Villa are allegedly contemplating whether to make an approach for a former Chelsea target during the summer transfer window.

arts.ttl: Southampton player in sights after signing Aston Villa youngster – Summer strategy already in works
arts.sum: RB Leipzig are targeting a summer move for Southampton youngster Tyler Dibling after signing Kosta Nedeljkovic from Aston Villa in January. That’s according to BILD, who report that the Aston Villa youngster’s arrival was the start of a focus on youth from the German side. arts.ttl: Mohamed Salah Liverpool contract latest - Carragher drops update, agent message, lawyer verdict
arts.sum: The latest Liverpool contract news on Mohamed Salah as the Reds are said to have offered their talisman a new deal amid reported interest from the Saudi Pro League

arts.ttl: Aston Villa's worst case scenario vs Liverpool as Unai Emery makes three late calls
arts.sum: Emery has called on Andres Garcia to fill the void at right-back, while he has fellow winter signings Axel Disasi and Marcus Rashford ready to help plug the gaps if Konsa and Bailey aren't in a position to play, but any one of those three doubts could yet make up a part of the squad. Emery wasn't able to confirm, meanwhile, if any of doubtful trio Matty Cash, Ezri Konsa or Leon Bailey would be in a position to make the squad tonight; Cash hobbled off at Wolves, while Konsa limped off against Tottenham in the FA Cup .

arts.ttl: Raphael Varane left 'surprised' by Marcus Rashford transfer to Aston Villa
arts.sum: Former Manchester United defender Raphael Varane, a teammate of Marcus Rashford at Old Trafford, is pleased to see that the forward has changed his environment as he seeks to rediscover his very best form - but he admits himself surprised that Rashford ended up at Aston Villa. arts.sum: Who could Liverpool , Arsenal and Aston Villa face in the round of 16 having already automatically qualified for that stage by virtue of finishing in the top eight of the initial league phase?
